entities.name: SESSION_STATE
entities.context: State tracking mechanism that determines routing logic for conversation/build closures

entities.name: drop-close
entities.context: Process for closing Pulse worker (Drop) threads, outputs structured deposit

entities.name: build-close
entities.context: Process for post-build synthesis, generates After Action Review

entities.name: thread-close
entities.context: Default closure process for normal conversation threads

entities.name: drop_id
entities.context: Identifier indicating session is a Pulse worker drop

entities.name: build_slug
entities.context: Identifier for a Pulse build without active drop context

entities.name: Deposit JSON
entities.context: Structured output format from drop closures for orchestrator review

entities.name: BUILD_AAR.md
entities.context: After Action Review document generated from build-level closures

entities.name: CLOSE_OUTPUT.json
entities.context: Standard closure output for regular thread completions

entities.name: AAR
entities.context: After Action Review - retrospective analysis document

relationships.context: Routes to drop-close when drop_id is present
Routes to build-close when build_slug present without drop_id
Routes to thread-close when neither drop_id nor build_slug present
